mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, role, status, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, UPPER(TRIM(role)) AS role, status, created_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, UPPER(TRIM(role)) AS role, status, created_at FROM sys_user ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, username, UPPER(TRIM(role)) AS role, status, created_at FROM sys_user
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE TRIM(username) = TRIM(#{username})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE TRIM(username) = TRIM(#{username}) AND id <> #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
